div.h2: Min/Max vs Percentile on Outlier-Heavy Distribution

div.p: In LLMs, outliers are statistically rare but magnitude-dominant. Calibrating to P100 (Max) wastes bits on empty space.
Percentile wins by treating outliers as noise to be clipped, significantly boosting SNR for the critical 99.9% signal.
99% of values use <5% of range! Normal range [-2, 2] maps to: [-5, 5] (only 11 of 256 levels) Quantization Error is high.
Clip 0.1% outliers, save 99.9%! Dedicates the full 8-bit grid to the active distribution. Lower MSE for normal paths.
